blocked_domains_top.name: Top Blocked Domains
blocked_domains_top.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access AND response_code:403 | stats by (authority) count() as count, max(_time) as last_seen | rename authority as domain | sort by (count) desc | limit {limit}

blocked_timeseries.name: Blocked Requests Over Time
blocked_timeseries.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access AND response_code:403 | stats by (_time:{interval}) count() as count

bandwidth_by_domain.name: Bandwidth by Domain
bandwidth_by_domain.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access | stats by (authority) sum(bytes_sent) as bytes_sent, sum(bytes_received) as bytes_received | math total_bytes = bytes_sent + bytes_received | rename authority as domain | sort by (total_bytes) desc | limit {limit}

requests_by_status.name: Requests by Status Code
requests_by_status.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access | stats by (response_code) count() as count | rename response_code as status_code | sort by (count) desc

request_volume.name: Request Volume
request_volume.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access | stats by (_time:{interval}) count() as total, count_if(response_code:403) as blocked, count_if(rate_limited:*) as rate_limited

latency_by_domain.name: Latency Percentiles by Domain
latency_by_domain.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access | stats by (authority) count() as request_count, avg(duration_ms) as avg_ms, max(duration_ms) as max_ms | rename authority as domain | sort by (avg_ms) desc | limit {limit}

credential_usage.name: Credential Injection by Domain
credential_usage.logsql: source:envoy AND log_type:access | stats by (authority) count() as total_requests, count_if(credential_injected:true) as injected_count | rename authority as domain | sort by (injected_count) desc | limit {limit}

dlp_detections.name: DLP Detections
dlp_detections.logsql: log_type:dlp_violation | stats by (dlp_host, dlp_pattern, dlp_mode) count() as count, max(_time) as last_seen | rename dlp_host as domain, dlp_pattern as pattern, dlp_mode as mode | sort by (count) desc | limit {limit}

dlp_timeseries.name: DLP Detections Over Time
dlp_timeseries.logsql: log_type:dlp_violation | stats by (_time:{interval}) count() as count
